claim(address).details: Only the beneficiary of the token can call this function.

returns.tokenAmount: The amount of the token claimed

delegateClaim(address).details: Only the roller or default admin can call this function. The claimed fee will be sent to the beneficiary of the token.

returns.quoteAmount: The amount of quote token (or ETH) claimed
returns.tokenAmount: The amount of the token claimed

returns.locks: The lock ids of the token

claim(address).notice: Revenue Share: Claim LP fees for a vanity token

delegateClaim(address).notice: Allows a roller or default admin to claim LP fees on behalf of the beneficiary

getLocks(address).notice: get the locks by token address

setTokenBeneficiary(address,address).notice: Allows the default admin to change the beneficiary of a token
